rulings.Case Title: KATY CHMURA VS. LAWRENCE CHOY ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion Of Plaintff Katy Chmura For Leave To Amend Second Amended Complaint To Add Karen Huang As A Named Defendant
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, October 18, 2016 line 1. PLAINTIFF KATY CHMURA's Motion Of Plaintiff Katy Chmura For Leave To Amend Second Amended Complaint To Add Karen Huang As A Named Defendant GRANTED. Amendment shall be filed forthwith. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: HUGO CHOX ET AL VS. TITA GUZMAN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Plaintiffs Hugo Chox, Licda Vega, Oscar Vega, Kelvin Chox, Yareny Florian, Kedy Galvez, Kedy Galvez, Argelia Mejia, Baltazar Espinoza, Vilma Galvez, Nicola Perez, Jaqueline Galvez And Martin Castaneda'S Motion For Leave To File A First Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, October 18, 2016 line 4. Plaintiffs Hugo Chox, Licda Vega, Oscar Vega, Kelvin Chox, Yareny Florian, Kedy Galvez, Kedy Galvez, Argelia Mejia, Baltazar Espinoza, Vilma Galvez, Nicola Perez, Jaqueline Galvez And Martin Castaneda'S Motion For Leave To File A First Amended Complaint GRANTED. First Amended Complaint to be filed and served forthwith. The Court notes that opposition was filed late without leave of Court and without any explanation for violation of CCP 1005. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: RAUL VASQUEZ VS. ROSA SOTO ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Amended Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Void Default And Default Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, October 18, 2016 line 2. DEFENDANT EVANGELINA SOTO, DAVID SOTO, VICENTE SOTO's Amended Motion To Set Aside Void Default And Default Judgment DENIED. The judgment is not void for lack of jurisdiction or due process. Defendants were served in accordance with CCP 415.45 by a registered process server. Defendants fail to rebut the presumption. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: LARRY E ODBERT VS. DONALD PIPKINS ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, October 18, 2016 line 3. DEFENDANT DONALD PIPKINS, LORNA PIPKINS, GEORGE HALLOND's Motion To Consolidate GRANTED, no opposition filed. = (501/REQ)
